---
Write a 1500+ word SEO-optimized blog post in [TARGETLANGUAGE] on the following topic:

[PROMPT]

Follow Google E-E-A-T principles. Use a natural, human tone. Avoid robotic or AI-style words. Start with a relatable problem. Use proper headings and short paragraphs.

After the article, also provide:
- SEO title
- Meta description
- Focus keyword
- URL slug
- FAQ schema in JSON-LD
